name: weechat
description: WeeChat Relay protocol bridge to any IRC network via local WeeChat instance

required_secrets.name: weechat_relay_password
required_secrets.prompt: Enter the WeeChat relay password (set via /set relay.network.password in WeeChat)

required_fields.name: relay_url
required_fields.prompt: WeeChat relay URL (default: http://127.0.0.1:9001, run /relay add api 9001 in WeeChat)

required_fields.name: connection_mode
required_fields.prompt: Connection mode: auto, websocket, or http (default: auto)

required_fields.name: ws_adapter_url
required_fields.prompt: WebSocket adapter URL for auto/websocket modes (default: http://127.0.0.1:6681)

required_fields.name: networks
required_fields.prompt: Allowed networks, comma-separated (empty = all, e.g. libera,oftc,darkirc)

required_fields.name: dm_policy
required_fields.prompt: DM policy: open, allowlist, or pairing (default: pairing)

required_fields.name: group_policy
required_fields.prompt: Group channel policy: open, allowlist, or deny (default: allowlist)

required_fields.name: allow_from
required_fields.prompt: Allowed senders as nicks or nick!user@host patterns (comma-separated, * for all)

required_fields.name: verbose_drops
required_fields.prompt: Enable verbose drop logging for filtered messages (true or false, default: false)
